title: Dossier (v2)
description: A reusable building block injected into the codegen LLM prompt. Lives at data/dossiers/{hard|soft}/<id>/manifest.json. Source-of-truth: docs/architecture/dossier-system.md

id.description: Kebab-case id. Must match the directory name (data/dossiers/{hard|soft}/<id>/).

capability.description: Abstract capability matched against brief.requestedCapabilities. Free-form kebab-case. The canonical source of currently-defined capabilities is whatever is on disk; run `npm run dossiers:capability-map:write` to regenerate data/dossiers/_index/capability-map.json after adding or renaming. Prefer reusing an existing capability id (so multiple dossiers can compete under the same label, e.g. stripe-checkout + klarna-checkout both use 'payments') over coining a new one.

codeFidelity.description: Default injection mode for files in this dossier. 'verbatim' = LLM emits files unchanged (Stripe webhooks, auth glue, SDK init). 'rewritable' = LLM may paraphrase (UI components, layout). Per-file override in files[].injectionMode.

complexity.description: simple = 1-2 files, no env. medium = 3-5 files or env required. advanced = >5 files or multi-step setup.

defaultForCapability.description: When two dossiers share the same capability, the one with defaultForCapability=true wins selection. Set true for the canonical implementation (e.g. Stripe over Klarna for 'payments').

summary.description: 1-3 sentences describing what the dossier does and when to use it. Shown in backoffice + included in prompt.

enforcement.description: How strictly the F3 readiness gate enforces this key. 'build' (default): real value required before F3 build can succeed. 'feature-runtime': SDK is imported but the dossier's UI shows a configuration banner / popup at runtime when the value is missing or a placeholder; F3 reports this as a warning, not a blocker (the Klarna-popup pattern). 'warn-only': dossier code self-disables when the value is empty (e.g. component returns null); not even a warning, just info. Omitted defaults to 'build' for backwards compatibility.

envVars.description: External secrets needed at runtime. Empty array (or omitted) means soft-class-style self-contained dossier.

dependencies.description: npm packages added to package.json. Use semver ranges (e.g. 'stripe@^14.0.0') only when a precise pin is required.

path.description: Path relative to the dossier directory. Typically under 'components/'.

injectionMode.description: Per-file override of the dossier's codeFidelity default.

exposes.description: Symbols the codegen LLM may import from this dossier.

lastVerified.description: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD when a human last validated the dossier against a real preview build.

sourceRepoUrl.description: Optional pointer to the upstream reference (typically a GitHub repo in data/template-references/).

notes.description: Free-form note for curators. Not surfaced to the LLM.
